caption: A man wearing glasses, a dark suit, a white dress shirt, and a red tie appears in a news broadcast setting. He stands in front of a blue background featuring a map of Africa and a circular graphic. To his left is a red vertical banner with the "plus tv" logo. The text "PLUS POLITICS" is prominently displayed in white letters next to him. A red banner at the bottom of the screen reads "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a white bar contains the text "FOLLOW US" and "PLUSTVAFRICA" alongside social media icons for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position and attire, speaking directly to the camera. In the final frame, the bottom white bar updates to include "WATCH ON", the "DStv" logo with "CH 408", and the "StarTimes" logo with "CH 308".
